issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Open and progress an incident affecting the Payment API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knew the general Statuspage incident lifecycle but used Bearer auth and omitted the components-status mapping payload; treatment POSTed to /v1/pages/{PAGE_ID}/incidents with Authorization: OAuth, the components map setting payment-api to degraded_performance, then PATCHed through identified to resolved with operational restore.

scenarios.name: Schedule a 2-hour database maintenance window 48h ahead
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gestured at the dashboard UI and missed required API fields; treatment POSTed an incident with status: scheduled plus scheduled_for and scheduled_until ISO timestamps targeting the database component_id, using the documented OAuth header against /v1/pages/{PAGE_ID}/incidents.
